mapper.sql: id, register_id, round_number, ai_question, patient_answer, consultation_state, chief_complaint, symptom_duration, history_summary, allergy_summary, medication_summary, ai_summary, suggested_exam, model_id, patient_id, session_uuid, creation_time, completion_time, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_consultation_record WHERE session_uuid = #{sessionUuid} ORDER BY round_number ASC
SELECT FROM ai_consultation_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY round_number ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_consultation_record ( register_id, round_number, ai_question, patient_answer, consultation_state, chief_complaint, symptom_duration, history_summary, allergy_summary, medication_summary, ai_summary, suggested_exam, model_id, patient_id, session_uuid, creation_time, completion_time, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{registerId}, #{roundNumber}, #{aiQuestion}, #{patientAnswer}, #{consultationState}, #{chiefComplaint}, #{symptomDuration}, #{historySummary}, #{allergySummary}, #{medicationSummary}, #{aiSummary}, #{suggestedExam}, #{modelId}, #{patientId}, #{sessionUuid}, #{creationTime}, #{completionTime}, #{updatedAt} )
